subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1914-11-09
subcodes.first_line: If these governments were endowed with deep insight they could see clearly that already all their ships are sunk and disappeared from the surface of [the] water.
subcodes.subjects: @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @war and peace, @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @universal peace; world unity, @spiritualization of humanity in the future; a new race of men
